sections.paragraph:
and שֶׂכֶל with suff. שִׂכְלֹו m.-

(1) understanding, intelligence, prudence, 1Ch 22:12 26:14 . שֵׂכֶל טֹוב good understanding, Pro 13:15 Psa 111:10 2Ch 30:22. שׂוּם שֶׂכֶל to give understanding (of any thing); das Berftändniß geben (eröffnen), Neh 8:8.

(2) in a bad sense, cunning, Dan 8:25.

(3) happiness, Pro 3:4.
